name: Points Emit
description: Initialize and maintain agent state for particle systems

global_xyz._role: PERSISTENT agent state-surface ([x, y, z=0, alive], positions normalized [0,1]). CREATED here (outputXyz alias). init writes it via MRT (SV_Target0): on respawn -> float4(newPos, 1.0); else passes through the prior value. Read back next frame to decide respawn-vs-persist (w<0.5 => dead). Sized stateSize x stateSize (256=65k, 512=262k, 1024=1M, 2048=4M agents). isStateSurface=true (suffix '_xyz') => end-of-frame bindings persist with NO swap. Consumed downstream by agent sims (physarum/flock/...) and pointsRender/pointsBillboardRender (VS reads pos via Texture2D.Load).

global_vel._role: PERSISTENT agent state-surface ([0, 0, rotRand, strideRand]). CREATED here (outputVel alias). init writes it via MRT (SV_Target1): on respawn -> float4(0,0,rotRand,strideRand) with rotRand=hash(agentSeed+100)[0,1], strideRand=hash(agentSeed+101)-0.5[-0.5,0.5]; else passes through. isStateSurface=true (suffix '_vel'). NOTE definition.js declares this rgba32f, but the WGSL emits 0,0,rotRand,strideRand.

global_rgba._role: PERSISTENT agent state-surface ([r, g, b, a] agent color). CREATED here (outputRgba alias). init writes it via MRT (SV_Target2): color sampled from inputTex at newPos (Load), or white if inputTex alpha==0; else passes through. isStateSurface=true (suffix '_rgba'). FORMAT rgba8 (definition.js) -> Unity ARGB32 (unorm). The MRT attachment 2 is 8-bit unorm while attachments 0/1 are rgba32f; the runtime MUST support a mixed-format MRT framebuffer for the init pass.

feedback._comment: Agent-state initializer (3D/RENDER tier middleware). Two FULLSCREEN passes, NO geometry: init (MRT3, drawBuffers:3) writes the three PERSISTENT 'global_' state-surfaces created here, then passthrough copies the pipeline input to outputTex. global_xyz/global_vel/global_rgba are isStateSurface by suffix ('_xyz'/'_vel'/'_rgba') => end-of-frame bindings persist with NO swap (agents continue from last frame); init reads its OWN prior 'global_' outputs (xyzTex/velTex/rgbaTex bound to the same keys it writes) to choose respawn-vs-persist, so the runtime double-buffers/ping-pongs these per write (reference 04 §10.2/§10.7). Respawn fires when resetState (injected 1/0) is set, when pPos.w<0.5 (dead/uninitialized), at t<0.01 on the first frame, or by random attrition (% per frame). Layout modes 0..5: random/grid/center/ring/clusters/spiral. No '_iteration' uniform; no repeat. Downstream agent sims and pointsRender/pointsBillboardRender consume these surfaces.
